cards.title: Add Annotations for Mutations
cards.notes:
Annotations are publicly available from various sources like Ensembl VEP and NCBI's ClinVar. There should be a column for each annotation source.

Will add a side SQL table that pulls this for every mutation in all databases (one copy per Position+Alt )
cards.system_notes:
During SQL database import, do API calls to appropriate webservices for the data.

Build a database with POSITION, ALT_MUTATION, ANNOTATION1, ANNOTATION2, etc.

cards.title: Save derived sample workflows
cards.notes: Persist comparison-derived samples and their source expressions across viewer sessions.

cards.title: Export filtered results
cards.notes: Download selected samples, mutation tables, or comparison results as CSV files.

cards.title: Database health panel
cards.notes: Surface schema version, table counts, missing indexes, and import metadata in the viewer.

cards.title: Mitochondrial position map
cards.notes: Add a compact genome strip that highlights filtered positions and selected sample overlap.

cards.title: Multi-database picker
cards.notes: Browse, upload, and switch between local SQLite databases from the header.
